speaker: speaker1
text: I called HP about my computer .

speaker: speaker1
text: They said I need a new hard drive .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's too bad . How much is a new one ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It's not too much , only about $ 85 .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , my hard drive is easy to remove and replace .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , it's just a couple of screws .

speaker: speaker1
text: It's a lot better than paying someone $ 60 .

speaker: speaker2
text: If my hard drive crashes , I'll just call you .
